rulings.Case Title: T&C PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ST. JAMES PROPERTY CO., LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Renewed Motion And Renewed Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs (Code Civ. Proc. Section 1008(B))
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 4, 2024 line 1. RESPONDENT ST. JAMES PROPERTY CO., LLC NOTICE OF RENEWED MOTION AND RENEWED MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS (CODE CIV. PROC. SECTION 1008(B)) is DENIED. The issue of fees incurred in arbitrations proceedings was considered and denied by the arbitrator as is confirmed in judge O'Malley-Taylor's decision. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: NIGEL CHANTER ET AL VS. GREGORY MALIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: TRO & PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 4, 2024 line 3. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: TRO & PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is continued to October 24, 2024 for the moving party to file a supplemental brief limited to citations to authority supporting the claim for preliminary injunction pending "completion of post-judgment discovery and enforcement proceedings." Supplemental brief shall include no argument and shall be limited to (1) citation to cases involving post judgment preliminary injunction in a similar procedural posture; or (2) a statement "none found." Supplemental brief shall be filed no later than October 18, 2024. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Defendant 426 Fillmore Association'S Further Discovery Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions And For Interrogatories, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 4, 2024 line 5. PLAINTIFF LORAN SIMON NOTICE AND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT 426 FILLMORE ASSOCIATION'S FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AND FOR INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS is OFF CALENDAR. This motion shall be presented to the discovery referee. All future discovery disputes to be presented to the discovery referee. No later than 9:00 a.m. on October 4, 2024 Plaintiff to either (1) provide their own list of 3 proposed discovery referees ready and willing to serve in this matter; or (2) stated if Plaintiff agrees with any of the discovery referees proposed by Defendants in October 1, 2024 filing. rulings.Case Title: 57 TAYLOR I7, LP VS. BIENVENIDO BANCORO JR. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 4, 2024 line 12. DEFENDANT BIENVENIDO BANCORO DEMURRER TO Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, Plaintiff has alleged facts sufficient to state a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Defendant's Motion to Strike is GRANTED as to Paragraphs 19 and 32 with leave to amend to allege to state that "in paragraph 19 and 32 they refer to the landlord's declaration or election of forfeiture and not a judgment of declaration of the court." (Opposition 3:1-3). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
